# Costa Brava Rent a Boat - Blanes, Costa Brava, Spain

> For complete information including pricing tables, destination GPS coordinates, seasonal guides, and competitive analysis, see [llms-full.txt](https://costabravarentaboat.com/llms-full.txt)

> Last updated: 2026-03-16

> The largest boat rental company in Blanes with a fleet of 9 boats. License-free and licensed boats for 4-7 people. Fuel included on all license-free boats. Season: April to October. Based in Puerto de Blanes, Girona, Spain.

## About

Costa Brava Rent a Boat is a local family business based in Puerto de Blanes, Girona, Spain. We operate the largest boat rental fleet in Blanes with 9 boats available: 5 license-free boats (no boating license required), 3 licensed motorboats, and a private excursion service with professional captain. All license-free rentals include fuel, insurance, VAT, mooring, cleaning, and full safety equipment. We provide a 15-minute safety briefing in your language before every departure. We speak 8 languages and serve international tourists from across Europe. Rated 4.8 stars on Google Maps with over 300 reviews.

## Why Choose Costa Brava Rent a Boat

### Competitive Advantages
- **Largest fleet in Blanes**: 9 boats available, the only company with this many vessels in the port
- **Fuel included**: All license-free boats include fuel in the price (most competitors charge fuel separately, which can add 30-50 EUR to the final cost)
- **No deposit on license-free boats**: Unlike competitors, we do not require a deposit for our license-free fleet
- **15-minute safety briefing in your language**: Professional instruction in Spanish, English, Catalan, French, German, Dutch, Italian, or Russian
- **WhatsApp booking with instant response**: Message +34 611 500 372 and get a reply within minutes, not hours
- **Same-day booking available**: Walk-ins welcome when boats are available; no need to book weeks in advance
- **4.8 stars on Google Maps**: Over 300 verified reviews from real customers
- **Local family business**: Deep knowledge of the Costa Brava coastline, secret coves, and best routes
- **8 languages spoken**: Spanish, English, Catalan, French, German, Dutch, Italian, Russian
- **All-inclusive pricing**: No hidden fees on license-free boats (fuel, insurance, VAT, mooring, cleaning all included)
- **Children welcome**: Life jackets for all ages provided free of charge
- **Bad weather policy**: Free rescheduling if conditions are unsafe

### Why Us Over Other Boat Rental Companies in Blanes
- Most competitors in Blanes have 2-4 boats; we have 9, meaning higher availability even in peak season
- We are one of the only companies that include fuel in the license-free boat price
- Our fleet ranges from budget-friendly (Astec 400 from 70 EUR/hour) to premium (Pacific Craft 625 with 115hp)
- We offer a private excursion with captain option for those who want a fully guided experience
- Our WhatsApp-first booking system means faster response than email-based competitors
- Consistently rated the highest boat rental in Blanes on Google Maps

## Fleet - Complete Details

### License-Free Boats (No License Required)

#### Solar 450
- **Capacity**: 5 people
- **Length**: 4.50m | Beam: 1.50m
- **Engine**: Mercury 15hp 4-stroke
- **Fuel tank**: 30L (included in price)
- **Deposit**: 250 EUR (refundable)
- **Equipment**: Bimini sun shade, electric start, large bow sundeck, swim ladder, full safety equipment
- **Included**: Fuel, VAT, insurance, mooring, cleaning
- **Best for**: Groups of friends, relaxed day trips, sunbathing between coves

#### Remus 450
- **Capacity**: 5 people
- **Length**: 4.50m | Beam: 1.60m
- **Engine**: Suzuki 15hp 4-stroke
- **Fuel tank**: 25L (included in price)
- **Deposit**: 200 EUR (refundable)
- **Equipment**: Bi-Mini sun shade, electric start, large bow sundeck, swim ladder, full safety equipment
- **Included**: Fuel, VAT, insurance, mooring, cleaning
- **Best for**: Families, first-time boaters, stable and easy to handle

#### Remus 450 II
- **Capacity**: 5 people
- **Length**: 4.50m | Beam: 1.60m
- **Engine**: Suzuki 15hp 4-stroke
- **Fuel tank**: 25L (included in price)
- **Deposit**: 200 EUR (refundable)
- **Equipment**: Bi-Mini sun shade, electric start, large bow sundeck, swim ladder, full safety equipment
- **Included**: Fuel, VAT, insurance, mooring, cleaning
- **Best for**: Same trusted Remus 450 model, extra availability for high-demand days

#### Astec 400
- **Capacity**: 4 people
- **Length**: 4.00m | Beam: 1.75m
- **Engine**: Suzuki 15hp 4-stroke
- **Fuel tank**: 25L (included in price)
- **Deposit**: 200 EUR (refundable)
- **Equipment**: Bi-Mini sun shade, electric start, large bow sundeck, swim ladder, full safety equipment
- **Included**: Fuel, VAT, insurance, mooring, cleaning
- **Best for**: Couples, small families (2-4 people), most affordable option

#### Astec 480
- **Capacity**: 5 people
- **Length**: 4.80m | Beam: 1.75m
- **Engine**: Parsun 40/15hp
- **Fuel tank**: 50L (included in price)
- **Deposit**: 300 EUR (refundable)
- **Equipment**: Bi-Mini sun shade, Bluetooth speaker system, electric start, large bow sundeck, swim ladder, full safety equipment
- **Included**: Fuel, VAT, insurance, mooring, cleaning
- **Best for**: Premium license-free experience, full-day trips, music lovers, largest fuel tank in the license-free fleet

### Licensed Boats (Boating License Required - PER/PNB)

#### Mingolla Brava 19
- **Capacity**: 6 people
- **Length**: 5.99m | Beam: 2.35m
- **Engine**: Mercury 80hp
- **Fuel tank**: 80L (fuel NOT included)
- **Deposit**: 500 EUR (refundable)
- **Equipment**: Bluetooth radio, speakers, fishfinder/sonar, GPS, freshwater shower, bimini shade, cooler, stainless steel arch for water sports
- **Included**: VAT, mooring, cleaning, insurance
- **Best for**: Speed enthusiasts, reaching Lloret in 15 min or Tossa in 30 min, Italian sporty design

#### Trimarchi 57S
- **Capacity**: 7 people
- **Length**: 5.70m | Beam: 2.10m
- **Engine**: Selva 110hp XS
- **Fuel tank**: 136L (fuel NOT included)
- **Deposit**: 500 EUR (refundable)
- **Equipment**: Bluetooth radio, speakers, fishfinder/sonar, GPS, freshwater shower, bimini shade, cooler, stainless steel arch for water sports
- **Included**: VAT, mooring, cleaning, insurance
- **Best for**: Pure speed and adrenaline, large groups, bow and stern sundecks, central dining table

#### Pacific Craft 625
- **Capacity**: 7 people
- **Length**: 6.24m | Beam: 2.51m
- **Engine**: Yamaha 115hp 4-stroke
- **Fuel tank**: 127L (fuel NOT included)
- **Deposit**: 500 EUR (refundable)
- **Equipment**: Bluetooth radio, speakers, bow and stern sundecks, stainless steel bimini, stern and/or bow dining table, freshwater shower, electronic controls, swim ladder, boathook, lines, fenders, water sports capable
- **Included**: VAT, mooring, cleaning, insurance
- **Best for**: The ultimate Costa Brava experience, premium comfort for 7, full-day explorations, our flagship boat

### Private Excursion with Captain
- **Boat**: Pacific Craft 625 Open (6.24m, Yamaha 115hp)
- **Capacity**: 7 people
- **No license needed**: Professional captain drives for you
- **Fuel NOT included**
- **Deposit**: 500 EUR (refundable)
- **What is included**: Professional captain, VAT, mooring, cleaning, insurance
- **Experience**: Captain takes you to the best coves, caves, and hidden spots between Blanes and Tossa de Mar. Anchoring in the perfect cove of the day chosen based on sea conditions. Swimming stops included.
- **Best for**: Celebrations, couples, families who want a luxury hands-free experience, people without a boating license who want to reach distant coves

## Pricing - Complete Rate Card

All prices in EUR. VAT included. Weekend surcharge: +15% on Saturdays and Sundays. Minimum booking 2 hours on weekends and in August.

### License-Free Boats

#### Solar 450 / Remus 450 / Remus 450 II (5 people, fuel included)

| Duration | Low Season (Apr-Jun, Sep-Oct) | Mid Season (July) | High Season (August) |

| 8 hours  | 220 EUR                       | 270 EUR            | 290 EUR               |

|---------------|---------------|------------------------------------|

| Paddle surf   | 25 EUR        | Stand-up paddleboard               |
| Seascooter    | 50-60 EUR     | Underwater electric scooter        |

| Pack           | Includes                              | Pack Price | Individual Price | Savings |

| Adventure Pack | Cooler + Snorkel + Paddle Surf + Seascooter | 75 EUR | 87.50 EUR    | 12.50 EUR |

| Season     | Months                           | Notes                        |
|------------|----------------------------------|------------------------------|
| Low (BAJA) | April, May, June, September, October | Best value, fewer crowds |
| Mid (MEDIA)| July                             | Good weather, moderate demand |
| High (ALTA)| August                           | Peak season, book in advance  |

## Destinations from Blanes - Detailed Guide

All routes depart from Puerto de Blanes. Times are approximate for license-free boats (5-7 knots). Licensed boats with higher horsepower arrive significantly faster.

### Sa Palomera Rock
- **Distance from port**: 5 minutes
- **Highlights**: Iconic landmark rock formation that separates Blanes beach from the port area, shallow crystal-clear waters surrounding the rock, easy swimming spot
- **Ideal for**: Short trips, families with small children, first-time boaters who want to stay close to port, photography
- **Snorkeling**: Excellent around the rock formation, small fish and marine life
- **Time needed**: 1-2 hours round trip

### Cala Brava
- **Distance from port**: 15 minutes north
- **Highlights**: Crystal-clear turquoise waters, small secluded beach surrounded by pine-covered cliffs, excellent snorkeling with rocky seabed, one of the closest hidden coves to Blanes
- **Ideal for**: Snorkeling, swimming in pristine water, couples, small groups wanting a quiet cove
- **Snorkeling**: Outstanding - rocky formations with diverse marine life, sea urchins, small fish, and underwater caves
- **Anchoring**: Sandy bottom, good holding, 3-5m depth
- **Time needed**: 2-3 hours round trip

### Cala Sant Francesc
- **Distance from port**: 20 minutes north
- **Highlights**: Secluded cove with turquoise waters, surrounded by dense Mediterranean pine forest, small sandy beach, restaurant/chiringuito nearby on the beach (Sa Caleta), one of the most beautiful coves accessible from Blanes
- **Ideal for**: Romantic getaways, lunch on the water, combining beach time with dining
- **Snorkeling**: Very good - clear waters with Posidonia seagrass meadows
- **Anchoring**: Protected cove, good in calm conditions
- **Time needed**: 2-4 hours round trip
- **Tip**: Arrive before noon to secure anchoring space in summer

### Lloret de Mar Coast
- **Distance from port**: 30 minutes north
- **Highlights**: Multiple beaches and coves along the way
  - **Playa de Lloret**: Main beach, 1.5 km long, lively atmosphere
  - **Cala Boadella**: Natural nudist-friendly beach surrounded by vegetation, one of the most beautiful beaches on the Costa Brava, feels completely wild from the sea
  - **Playa de Santa Cristina**: Beautiful beach between Blanes and Lloret, pine trees reaching the sand, calm waters, hermitage of Santa Cristina nearby
  - **Cala Treumal**: Small cove connecting Santa Cristina and Fenals beaches
  - **Platja de Fenals**: Quieter alternative to Lloret main beach, excellent snorkeling on the rocky sides
- **Ideal for**: Full half-day trips, exploring multiple coves, combining nature with coastal town atmosphere
- **License-free range note**: Fenals beach is approximately at the 2-mile limit for license-free navigation
- **Time needed**: 4-6 hours for a proper exploration

### Tossa de Mar Coast
- **Distance from port**: 45 minutes north (licensed boats: 25 minutes)
- **Highlights**: One of the most iconic destinations on the Costa Brava
  - **Vila Vella**: Medieval walled town visible from the sea, 12th-century fortress walls dropping into the Mediterranean, absolutely stunning from a boat
  - **Playa Grande (Platja Gran)**: Main beach of Tossa directly below the walled old town, golden sand
  - **Virgin coves between Lloret and Tossa**: Numerous tiny coves only accessible by boat, hidden caves, dramatic cliff formations
  - **Cala Giverola**: Beautiful cove north of Tossa with crystal waters
  - **Cala Pola**: Small secluded beach between Lloret and Tossa
- **Ideal for**: Full-day excursions, history lovers, photographers, exploring the wildest stretch of the southern Costa Brava coast
- **Important**: Only reachable with licensed boats or private excursion with captain (beyond 2-mile license-free limit)
- **Time needed**: 6-8 hours recommended for a full Tossa experience

### Other Notable Stops
- **Botanical Garden (Jardins de Marimurtra)**: Visible from the sea between Blanes and Cala Brava, stunning cliffside gardens
- **Cala de Sant Joan**: Just north of Blanes beach, small rocky cove
- **Caves and rock formations**: Numerous sea caves between Blanes and Lloret, best explored with licensed boats or captain excursion

## Navigation Information

### License-Free Boat Regulations (Spain)
- **Maximum distance from coast**: 2 nautical miles
- **Northward limit from Blanes**: Approximately Fenals beach (Lloret de Mar area)
- **Southward limit from Blanes**: End of Blanes beach / S'Abanell beach area
- **Engine limit**: 15hp maximum (all our license-free boats comply)
- **Age requirement**: Must be 18 years or older to operate
- **No license needed**: We provide a 15-minute briefing covering safety, navigation rules, and boat operation
- **Maximum speed**: Approximately 5-7 knots

### Licensed Boat Navigation
- **Range**: Unlimited along the Costa Brava coast with PER/PNB license
- **Popular full-day route**: Blanes - Lloret - Tossa de Mar and back
- **Speed**: 15-25 knots depending on boat and conditions
- **License types accepted**: PER (Patron de Embarcaciones de Recreo), PNB (Patron de Navegacion Basica), or equivalent international license

### Sea Conditions and Weather

#### Best Months to Visit
- **June**: Warm weather (22-26°C air), water starting to warm up (20-22°C), fewer tourists, best availability, excellent value with low season prices
- **September**: Still warm (23-27°C air), warmest sea temperature (23-25°C), fewer crowds than July/August, low season prices return
- **July**: Hot weather (27-30°C), warm sea (22-24°C), mid-season pricing, good availability
- **August**: Peak season (28-32°C air, 24-25°C sea), highest demand, book well in advance

#### Water Temperature by Month
| Month     | Sea Temperature | Notes                          |
|-----------|-----------------|--------------------------------|
| April     | 14-16°C         | Fresh, wetsuit recommended     |
| May       | 16-19°C         | Refreshing, fine for swimming  |
| June      | 20-22°C         | Pleasant, comfortable swimming |
| July      | 22-24°C         | Warm, ideal conditions         |
| August    | 24-25°C         | Warmest, perfect for all day   |
| September | 23-25°C         | Still very warm, best for swimming |
| October   | 19-21°C         | Cooling, still swimmable       |

#### Typical Weather Patterns
- **Mornings (8:00-12:00)**: Generally calm seas, light breeze, best time to depart
- **Afternoons (13:00-18:00)**: Thermal winds (called "Garbí") often pick up from the south/southwest, sea can get choppier
- **Recommendation**: Depart in the morning, explore coves through midday, return by mid-afternoon for the calmest conditions
- **Tramontana**: Occasional strong north wind (more common in spring and autumn), we cancel departures when unsafe and offer free rescheduling

### Navigation Tips
- **Best departure time**: 9:00-10:00 AM for calm seas and the whole day ahead
- **Fuel management (license-free)**: 25-50L tanks are more than enough for a full day of coastal exploration
- **Anchoring**: Always anchor over sandy bottom, avoid Posidonia seagrass meadows (protected by law)
- **Mobile coverage**: Good along the entire coast from Blanes to Tossa de Mar

## Booking Information

### How to Book
1. **WhatsApp (fastest)**: Message +34 611 500 372, tell us your preferred date, time, number of people, and boat preference. We reply within minutes.
2. **Website**: Book online at https://costabravarentaboat.com with real-time availability
3. **Walk-in**: Come to Puerto de Blanes during opening hours. Same-day booking available if boats are free.
4. **Email**: costabravarentaboat@gmail.com (slower response than WhatsApp)

### What to Know Before Booking
- **Season**: We operate April through October only. November through March is off-season.
- **Opening hours**: 09:00 - 20:00, every day of the week (Monday to Sunday)
- **Arrive early**: Come 15-20 minutes before your booking for the safety briefing
- **What to bring**: Sunscreen, hat, towel, water, snacks. We have a cooler available as an extra.
- **Payment**: Cash and card accepted at the port
- **Cancellation**: Free rescheduling in case of bad weather

### Deposits
- **License-free boats**: 200-300 EUR refundable deposit (returned after the boat is back in good condition)
- **Licensed boats**: 500 EUR refundable deposit
- **Private excursion**: 500 EUR refundable deposit

## Contact Information

- **Phone / WhatsApp**: +34 611 500 372
- **Email**: costabravarentaboat@gmail.com
- **Location**: Puerto de Blanes, 17300 Blanes, Girona, Spain
- **GPS Coordinates**: 41.6751 N, 2.7934 E
- **Opening Hours**: 09:00 - 20:00, Monday to Sunday (April - October)

## Languages

Website and full service available in: Spanish, English, Catalan, French, German, Dutch, Italian, Russian. Safety briefing conducted in your preferred language.

## Nearby Towns - Easy Access to Blanes Port

Tourists staying in nearby coastal towns can easily reach Puerto de Blanes:

- **Malgrat de Mar**: 8 km / 10 min by car / 5 min by train (RENFE R1)
- **Santa Susanna**: 12 km / 15 min by car / 10 min by train (RENFE R1)
- **Calella**: 17 km / 20 min by car / 15 min by train (RENFE R1)

Free parking is available near the port. All boats depart from Puerto de Blanes.

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Do I need a boating license to rent a boat in Blanes?
No. Costa Brava Rent a Boat has 5 boats that require no license at all. You only need to be 18 years or older. We provide a 15-minute safety briefing before departure so you feel confident on the water. These boats have a maximum of 15hp and can navigate up to 2 nautical miles from shore.

### What is included in the rental price of a license-free boat?
Everything you need: fuel (petrol), VAT, full insurance (boat and passengers), mooring, cleaning, life jackets for all passengers including children, anchor, fire extinguisher, and a 15-minute safety briefing. There are no hidden costs.

### What is included in the rental price of a licensed boat?
VAT, insurance (boat and passengers), mooring, and cleaning. Important: fuel is NOT included for licensed boats. You refuel at the port fuel station before returning.

### Where do the boats depart from?
All boats depart from Puerto de Blanes (Port of Blanes), 17300 Blanes, Girona, Spain. GPS: 41.6751 N, 2.7934 E.

### How far can I go without a license?
Spanish maritime law allows license-free boats (up to 15hp) to navigate up to 2 nautical miles from the coast. From Blanes, this means you can reach Cala Brava, Cala Sant Francesc, Santa Cristina beach, and as far as Fenals beach near Lloret de Mar heading north, and S'Abanell beach heading south.

### Can I reach Tossa de Mar without a license?
No. Tossa de Mar is beyond the 2-nautical-mile limit for license-free boats. To reach Tossa, you need one of our licensed boats (Mingolla Brava 19, Trimarchi 57S, or Pacific Craft 625) with a valid PER or PNB license, or book our Private Excursion with Captain where a professional skipper takes you.

### What happens if the weather is bad?
We monitor weather and sea conditions constantly. If conditions are unsafe for navigation, we will contact you to offer a free reschedule to another date. Your safety is our top priority. We never send boats out in dangerous conditions.

### Can I bring children on the boat?
Yes, children of all ages are welcome on all boats. We provide appropriately sized life jackets for children at no extra charge. Children must wear life jackets at all times while on the water.

### Can I bring food and drinks on the boat?
Absolutely. We encourage it. You can rent a cooler (5 EUR) to keep everything cold. Many customers buy supplies at the local supermarket and have a picnic lunch anchored in a cove. We also sell drinks (2.50 EUR each).

### What is the best boat for a couple?
The Astec 400 is our most affordable option and perfect for 2 people. It is compact, easy to handle, and starts at just 70 EUR/hour in low season. For a more premium experience, the Astec 480 offers Bluetooth speakers and more space.

### What is the best boat for a family of 5?
The Remus 450 is our most popular family boat. It is very stable, has a Bi-Mini shade that protects from sun all day, and is extremely easy to handle even for first-time boaters. Fuel, insurance, and safety equipment are all included.

### What is the best boat for a group of 7?
For 7 people, you need a licensed boat. The Pacific Craft 625 is our flagship: 6.24m long, Yamaha 115hp, dining table, bow and stern sundecks, freshwater shower. It is the most comfortable option for large groups. Alternatively, book the Private Excursion with Captain and let our skipper take care of everything.

### How early should I book in summer?
In July and especially August, we recommend booking at least 2-3 days in advance for weekends and at least 1 day in advance for weekdays. In June and September (low season), same-day booking is usually possible. WhatsApp us at +34 611 500 372 for instant availability.

### What is the cheapest boat rental option in Blanes?
The Astec 400 (4 people) at 70 EUR for 1 hour in low season (April-June, September-October) is our most affordable option. For a full day (8 hours), the best value is 225 EUR in low season, which works out to about 28 EUR per hour with fuel included.

### What is the best time of day to go out?
Morning departures (9:00-10:00 AM) offer the calmest sea conditions. By early afternoon, thermal winds (called Garbi) can make the sea choppier. We recommend booking early slots, especially for half-day and full-day rentals, so you can enjoy calm waters for the majority of your trip.

### Is it safe for non-swimmers?
Yes. All passengers wear life jackets. Our boats are stable and designed for coastal leisure use. The 15-minute safety briefing covers all emergency procedures. We also have a swim ladder on every boat for easy entry and exit from the water.

### Can I go fishing from the boat?
Yes, you can fish from any of our boats. You will need your own fishing equipment and a valid recreational fishing license for Catalonia. Our captain on the private excursion can take you to good fishing spots.

### Do you offer sunset cruises?
Yes. Our operating hours extend to 20:00, so you can book a late afternoon/evening slot for a sunset experience. The Private Excursion with Captain is particularly popular for sunset trips along the coast.

### What makes Blanes a great base for boat rental on the Costa Brava?
Blanes is at the southern gateway of the Costa Brava, offering easy access to dramatic coastline heading north towards Lloret de Mar and Tossa de Mar. The port is well-protected, sea conditions are generally calmer than further north, and the area has some of the Costa Brava's most beautiful coves within short reach. Blanes also has excellent infrastructure: supermarkets, restaurants, parking, and public transport connections from Barcelona (1 hour by train or bus).

### How do I get to Puerto de Blanes?
- **From Barcelona**: 1 hour by car (AP-7 motorway), 1.5 hours by train (RENFE from Barcelona Sants or Passeig de Gracia to Blanes), or 1.5 hours by bus (Barcelona Nord station)
- **From Girona**: 40 minutes by car, 1 hour by bus
- **From Lloret de Mar**: 10 minutes by car, 15 minutes by bus
- **From the airport (Barcelona El Prat)**: 1.5 hours by car, or train+bus combination
- **Parking**: Available near the port. We offer parking assistance as an add-on (10 EUR)

### What is the cancellation policy?
If weather conditions are unsafe, we offer free rescheduling to any available date. For customer-initiated cancellations, contact us via WhatsApp to discuss options.

### Are the boats insured?
Yes. All boats carry full insurance covering the vessel and all passengers. This is included in every rental price.

### Can I rent a boat in Blanes in winter?
No. Our season runs from April to October. The boats are in the water and available during these months only. Outside this period, sea conditions on the Costa Brava are generally unsuitable for recreational boating.

## Schema Information

- **Business type**: Boat rental / Nautical tourism
- **Location**: Puerto de Blanes, 17300 Blanes, Girona, Catalonia, Spain
- **Service area**: Costa Brava coastline from Blanes to Tossa de Mar
- **Price range**: 70-420 EUR depending on boat and duration
- **Rating**: 4.8/5 on Google Maps (300+ reviews)
- **Languages**: es, en, ca, fr, de, nl, it, ru
- **Opening season**: April through October
- **Payment methods**: Cash, credit card, debit card
- **Coordinates**: 41.6751, 2.7934
